description_long: This is a modern cabin composed of two main rectangular volumes connected by a covered wooden walkway. The exterior features vertical wooden siding in a natural brown tone, complemented by a dark metal gable roof with slight overhangs. Large windows and sliding glass doors are present on the longer section, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The smaller section has a prominent gable roof and a single large window, while the connecting walkway is open with visible wooden beams. The cabin is elevated on short piers, suggesting adaptation for uneven terrain or flood-prone areas. The overall design blends rustic materials with modern lines, making it suitable for urban or suburban settings.
description: A modern, two-section cabin with vertical wood siding, dark gable roofs, large windows, and a covered connecting walkway. Elevated on piers, it combines rustic and contemporary architectural elements.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from the side, showing both main volumes, the connecting walkway, and the large window and door arrangements on the longer section.
description_view_1: A narrow end view highlights the gable roof and a single window on the smaller section, with the connecting walkway partially visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side reveals the main facade with large sliding glass doors, multiple windows, and the open porch area.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the gable end of the smaller section, showing a single window and the side of the connecting walkway.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, metal cladding, and slight overhangs on both main sections
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple large rectangular windows and sliding glass doors on the longer section, with a single large window on the smaller section; windows are asymmetrically distributed and vary in size, providing a modern look
attribute_door_placement: One main exterior door located on the longer section, adjacent to the connecting walkway and porch area; sliding glass doors are prominent on the main facade
